steps.title: Find where x equals 0 on the y-axis
steps.content: The y-intercept is where the parabola crosses the y-axis, which occurs when $x = 0$. Locate the y-axis (the vertical line through the origin) and identify where the parabola intersects it.

steps.title: Read the y-coordinate from the graph
steps.content: At $x = 0$, trace vertically along the y-axis to the point where the parabola crosses. Reading the y-value directly from the gridlines, the parabola intersects the y-axis at $y = 7$. The answer is 7.
